<!--
A short summary of what and why helps reviewers — they read diffs, so a few lines is plenty.
-->

## Summary
<!-- One to three lines: what does this change do, and why? -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Build / chore

## Linked issues
<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Leave empty if none. -->

## Checks
- [ ] Breaking change noted below (or none)

## Notes for review
<!-- Anything non-obvious, risky, or worth a second look. A line or two. Skip if nothing. -->

---

- [ ] I understand every change here and why it's needed.
